settings.title:
Your Wave.
Your Way.
settings.subheading: Premium boats, pro-grade gear, and waterfront apparel — hand-picked for Gulf riders. Free worldwide shipping from Doha.
settings.social_proof_text: ★★★★★ Trusted by 500+ riders across the GCC

settings.text: LOCALLY IN QATAR  •  FREE WORLDWIDE SHIPPING  •  AUTHORIZED DEALER  •  14-DAY RETURNS

settings.title: Qatar's Only Authorized Dealer
settings.text: Official dealer for Tigé, ATX, Hyperlite & HO Sports. Every product is genuine, warranty-backed, and sourced direct from the manufacturer.

settings.title: Free Worldwide Shipping
settings.text: Orders ship same-day from our Doha warehouse. Average delivery: 3 days GCC, 7 days worldwide. Every order tracked door-to-door.

settings.title: Expert Support in <2 Hours
settings.text: Real water sports enthusiasts, not chatbots. WhatsApp, call, or email — we respond within 2 business hours, every time.

settings.title: 14-Day Easy Returns
settings.text: Changed your mind? Return any unused item within 14 days for a full refund. No questions, no hassle, no restocking fees.
Ordered Pro-V goggles on Monday, had them by Wednesday in Dubai. The real deal — box sealed, warranty card inside. These guys are legit.
settings.author: Ahmed K.

settings.text: Bought a full Hyperlite setup — board, bindings, vest. Shamlan walked me through everything on WhatsApp, even sent a video of proper binding setup.
settings.author: Khalid M.

settings.text: Configured my Tigé Z5 through Varkomz. From quote to marina delivery in Yas Island took 8 weeks. The boat is absolutely perfect — worth every dirham.
settings.author: James R.

settings.subtitle: TIGÉ BOATS — BUILT FOR THE GULF
settings.title: Design Your Tigé. Ride It This Season.
settings.text: Configure your dream Tigé boat online, get a custom quote in 24 hours, and take delivery at our Doha marina. 12 Tigé boats delivered in Qatar since 2023.

settings.subtitle: ATX SURF BOATS — PERFORMANCE MEETS STYLE
settings.title: Your ATX. Configured in Minutes.
settings.text: Choose your hull, features, and finish. We handle import, registration, and marina delivery across the GCC. Starting from QAR 280,000 with finance available.

settings.title: Life on the Water
settings.subtitle: Gulf riders, Doha sunsets, and the gear that makes it possible.

settings.title: Built for Performance
settings.subtitle: Pro-grade equipment from the world's best water sports brands.

settings.title: Your Adventure Starts Here
settings.subtitle: From first ride to competition day — we've got you covered.

settings.title: Get Your Custom Boat Quote in 24 Hours
settings.text: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll send a detailed quote with pricing, delivery timeline, and financing options. Whether it's a Tigé, ATX, or gear bundle — we've got you covered.
